claim_text: Katyayani Trust currently identifies its Vrindavan institution as Keshav Ashram, Radha Bagh, Vrindaban.
notes: Separately confirms the current institutional footprint relevant to the Keshavanand relation; supplements predecessor GC-003.

claim_text: Katyayani Trust states that Swami Keshavanand went to Vrindavan and consecrated the Katyayani temple in 1923.
notes: Institutional own-history claim, not independent historical proof.

claim_text: The AOAY relation remains not fully double-verified because a controlled AOAY/SRF/YSS edition passage was not reliably obtained, although the current physical institutional footprint is now separately confirmed.
notes: Physical-place half improved; controlled-edition half open.

claim_text: Katyayani Trust currently offers named seva and pooja forms and states that donations support pilgrim facilities and temple-ashram upkeep.
notes: Confirms continuing institution-carried practice, not public opening hours.

claim_text: Current official operational management of Neem Karoli Baba Ashram Vrindavan was not reliably established.
A current official recurring-practice schedule for Neem Karoli Baba Ashram Vrindavan was not reliably established.

Recent event reporting confirms that Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi access can be subject to extensive temporary security, sector, surveillance and traffic controls; stable ordinary July 2026 opening conditions remain unverified.
notes: Event-specific controls cannot establish ordinary hours.

claim_text: UPBTVP has a statutory regional role in Braj heritage planning, preservation, development, coordination and monitoring, but the retrieved sources do not establish it as exclusive daily operator of each distributed object.
notes: Lowers but does not eliminate predecessor GC-016.

claim_text: UPBTVP currently identifies Kusum Sarovar as a Braj heritage/development object.
notes: Public institutional involvement confirmed; exclusive daily management not established.

claim_text: Continuing Govardhan parikrama context supports recurring pilgrim passage at Kusum Sarovar, but a separately organized recurring object-level practice remains not established.
notes: Circuit context is not equivalent to a distinct object-level schedule.

claim_text: Fysieke plek bevestigd; actuele bezoekbaarheid niet betrouwbaar vastgesteld.
notes: Applied individually to all eight candidates because complete authoritative current access regimes were not obtained.
